hero.title: On-site support in Jujuy and NOA
hero.subtitle: Preventive maintenance, networks, hardware and remote assistance for regional businesses.

items.title: PC maintenance
items.desc: Cleaning, diagnosis, repair and hardware/software upgrades.

items.title: Networks & infrastructure
items.desc: Installation and configuration of LAN/WAN networks, enterprise WiFi and structured cabling.

items.title: Servers
items.desc: Installation, configuration and maintenance of physical and virtual servers.

items.title: Remote support
items.desc: Immediate assistance via TeamViewer or AnyDesk for problems that don't require physical presence.

items.title: Backup & security
items.desc: Automatic backup setup, corporate antivirus and security policies.

items.title: IT consulting
items.desc: Advisory for technology decision-making in your company.

plans.title: Monthly support plans
plans.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your company size.

basic.name: Basic
basic.desc: Ideal for small businesses with few computers.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For medium-sized companies with more complex infrastructure.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For companies with high support demand and multiple locations.

coverage.title: Coverage area
coverage.desc: We operate in San Salvador de Jujuy and provide on-site support throughout the province and the NOA region.

items.q: How quickly do you respond to emergencies?
items.a: For clients with an active plan, remote response time is under 2 hours. Urgent visits are coordinated same-day in San Salvador de Jujuy.

items.q: Do you work with companies without a monthly plan?
items.a: Yes, we handle one-time calls. Monthly plan clients have priority and preferential pricing.

items.q: What if the problem can't be solved remotely?
items.a: We coordinate an on-site visit the same day or next business day depending on urgency.

items.q: Do you cover specific hardware brands?
items.a: We work with any brand of PCs, laptops, printers and network equipment. No brand restrictions.

items.q: Can you handle the complete setup of a new office?
items.a: Yes. We design and install the network, configure servers, PCs and printers from scratch.

cta.title: Need support now?
cta.subtitle: Call us or message us and we'll assist you shortly.
